signal_title: 정보통신망 이용촉진 및 정보보호 등에 관한 법률 시행령 일부개정령안 입법예고
risk_rationale: The draft bill introduces new requirements for approval processes related to linked information, which may affect data processing and compliance operations in Korea. This represents a moderate risk as it could require adjustments to existing processes but does not pose an immediate existential threat.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: EU-US transfers use EU-US Data Privacy Framework + SCCs.
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Approval required for generating and processing linked information.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The draft bill requires approval for processing linked information, which may necessitate changes to data transfer mechanisms and compliance processes in Korea.

remediations.title: Implement Approval Process for Linked Information
remediations.description: Develop and implement a process to obtain necessary approvals for generating and processing linked information in compliance with the new Korean regulations.
acceptance_criteria: Approval process is documented and implemented
Compliance with Korean regulations is verified

business_impact: The requirement for approval of linked information processing may lead to delays in data operations and increased compliance costs in Korea.
recommended_actions: Review the draft bill in detail to understand specific approval requirements
Engage with Korean regulatory authorities to clarify approval processes
Update internal compliance processes to align with new requirements
